flux.description: Representative X-ray flux of the source in the most significant energy band specified by spectral_band and spectral_band_units [erg/cm^2/s].

detection_timescale.description: Detection time scale of the source; unit specified by source_tunits.

detection_timescale_units.description: Unit of source_tscale: s (seconds), orbit (one ISS orbit), or d (days).

band_flux_low.description: Two-element array [flux, 1-sigma statistical uncertainty] for the 2-4 keV band [erg/cm^2/s].

band_flux_med.description: Two-element array [flux, 1-sigma statistical uncertainty] for the 4-10 keV band [erg/cm^2/s].

band_flux_high.description: Two-element array [flux, 1-sigma statistical uncertainty] for the 10-20 keV band [erg/cm^2/s].
